segments.text: three books I'm obsessed with and why number one don't sweat the small stuff it allows you to learn different ways to
not let the small things in life take over your entire life it is in little chapters so if you're somebody who's just beginning to read and somebody who
does not like a lot of long text this book is perfect for you number two Priyanka chopra's unfinished whenever
you don't feel like reading a self-help book but you still want to grow I really suggest you pick up an autobiography of somebody you Maya just to see what their
life story has been like and what are the different challenges that they' have overcome number three and my most favorite of them all is the one-onone
essays that will change the way that you think this is a fatter book pick a problem that's bothering you for a long long long time you will find an answer
to that problem in this book and you will find a fresh perspective of how to look at the same problem in this book try it out
